If you’re passionate about building cutting-edge AI systems and working on real-world generative AI applications, this role is for you.

💰 Budget: Up to 17 LPA
📍 Location: Remote
🏢 Employment Type: Full-Time (FTE)

Build & optimize Generative AI models (Text, Image, Audio)

⚙️ Key Skills Required:
Strong Python programming
